nasb.text: Two sons were born to Eber, the name of the one was Peleg, for in his days the earth was divided, and his brother’s name was Joktan.

esv.text: To Eber were born two sons: the name of the one was Peleg (for in his days the earth was divided), and his brother’s name was Joktan.

cnv.text: 希伯生了兩個兒子，一個名叫法勒，因為他在世的時候，世人就分散各地；法勒的兄弟名叫約坍。

ccb.text: 希伯有两个儿子，一个名叫法勒，因为那时，世人分地而居；法勒的兄弟叫约坍。
